ogTitle: Murrumba vs Murrumba Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrumba and Murrumba Downs.
heading: Murrumba vs Murrumba Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrumba, Queensland and Murrumba Downs, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrumba Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Murrumba (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrumba or Murrumba Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrumba has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Murrumba Downs scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrumba scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Murrumba Downs scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrumba or Murrumba Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrumba Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
